title: teucrium balfourii
intro: Teucrium balfourii, also known as Balfour's germander, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is a shrubby perennial herb with a long history of medicinal use, traditionally employed to treat a variety of ailments due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Teucrium balfourii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant effects, making it a valuable natural remedy for several common health problems. Teucrium balfourii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of herbal preparations.
